SEARCH
Package com.example.moogerscouncil

Class CounselorRepository

java.lang.Object
com.example.moogerscouncil.CounselorRepository
public class CounselorRepository extends Object
Repository for the Firestore 'counselors' collection. All reads and writes to counselor documents flow through this class. Activities depend on this class, never on FirebaseFirestore directly.

Follows the Repository design pattern to isolate the data layer and maintain consistency with UserRepository from Sprint 1.

    Class
    Description
    static interface 
    CounselorRepository.OnCounselorFetchedCallback
    Callback for operations that return a single counselor.
    static interface 
    CounselorRepository.OnCounselorsLoadedCallback
    Callback for operations that return a list of counselors.
    static interface 
    CounselorRepository.OnUpdateCallback
    Callback for write operations (update / set).

  • Constructor Details

    • CounselorRepository

      public CounselorRepository()
      Initialises the repository with a reference to the 'counselors' collection.

  • Method Details

    • getAllCounselors

      public void getAllCounselors(CounselorRepository.OnCounselorsLoadedCallback callback)
      Fetches all counselor documents from Firestore. The full list is returned — filtering happens client-side in the Activity for responsiveness.
      Parameters:
      callback - Receives the list on success, or an Exception on failure.

    • getCounselor

      public void getCounselor(String counselorId, CounselorRepository.OnCounselorFetchedCallback callback)
      Fetches a single counselor by their Firestore document ID.
      Parameters:
      counselorId - The Firestore document ID.
      callback - Receives the Counselor on success, or an Exception on failure.

    • updateSpecializations

      public void updateSpecializations(String counselorId, List<String> specializations, CounselorRepository.OnUpdateCallback callback)
      Updates the specialization tags for a counselor.
      Parameters:
      counselorId - The Firestore document ID.
      specializations - The updated list of specialization tag strings.
      callback - Success/failure callback.

    • updateCounselorProfile

      public void updateCounselorProfile(String counselorId, Counselor counselor, CounselorRepository.OnUpdateCallback callback)
      Overwrites all profile fields for a counselor. Used by CounselorProfileEditActivity when saving bio, language, gender, and specializations together.

      Uses set() so this also creates the document if it does not yet exist (first-time profile setup).

      Parameters:
      counselorId - The Firestore document ID.
      counselor - The updated Counselor object — all fields overwritten.
      callback - Success/failure callback.

    • setOnLeaveStatus

      public void setOnLeaveStatus(String counselorId, boolean onLeave, String leaveMessage, String referralId, CounselorRepository.OnUpdateCallback callback)
      Updates only the on-leave status fields for a counselor. Uses update() instead of set() to avoid overwriting existing profile fields (bio, specializations, etc.) when only the leave status is changing.
      Parameters:
      counselorId - The Firestore document ID.
      onLeave - Whether the counselor is on leave.
      leaveMessage - Custom message shown to students (nullable).
      referralId - Document ID of the referral counselor (nullable).
      callback - Success/failure callback.
